## Meeting Purpose

[Sales standup to discuss ongoing deals, client management, and team capacity issues.](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to close deals for Airbyte, Biologica, Town, and Engine before their next sprint phases](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Team capacity issues with George transitioning roles; Kyle may need to temporarily assist (50% time) for August-September](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Concerns about overselling custom work (e.g. newsletters) that the team can't easily deliver](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Discussion on improving proactive communication for contract renewals and scope adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Dinner Event Planning

  - [Compiling list of CEO/founder contacts for potential dinner invitees](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Alice and Dig handling current customers; Kyle to provide 20 prospect accounts](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Small dinner (25 people) with Madrona inviting some of their CEOs](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Invites to be sent next week; event is in about a month](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### Geneva/Custom Newsletter Issue

  - [Confusion over selling custom newsletter to Geneva outside standard offerings](https://fathom.video/share/XtGgX8JA8gYZ1APVD4UbAxxPJARxptWf?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Deal Closures and Renewals
